name: extension-update-delay
description: Delays VS Code extension updates until Marketplace releases are at least 24 hours old.

commands.title: Extension Update Delay: Check Updates Now

extensionUpdateDelay.delayHours.description: Minimum age in hours for a Marketplace release before this extension installs it.

extensionUpdateDelay.checkIntervalHours.description: How often to check for delayed extension updates.

extensionUpdateDelay.autoCheck.description: Automatically check for eligible extension updates on an interval.

extensionUpdateDelay.disableBuiltInAutoU.description: Set extensions.autoUpdate to false so VS Code does not update extensions immediately.

extensionUpdateDelay.codeExecutable.description: Path or command name for the VS Code CLI.

extensionUpdateDelay.excludeExtensions.description: Extension IDs to skip, for example publisher.name.
